fieldDescriptions.randomness: 0 = always optimal move, 1 = fully random. Injected as noise into move scoring.
fieldDescriptions.passiveSeeking: 0 = ignores passive fruit, 1 = prioritises passive fruit collection above all else.
fieldDescriptions.abilityUsage: Probability [0-1] of using an available ability on any given action.
fieldDescriptions.abilityTiming: 0 = uses ability at first opportunity, 1 = waits for highest-value moment.
fieldDescriptions.fruitPreferenceWeight: Score multiplier bonus for matches of the passive fruit type.
fieldDescriptions.scoreMaximizing: 0 = picks first valid move, 1 = always picks move with highest fruit count destroyed.
fieldDescriptions.modifierAwareness: Probability [0-1] of intentionally triggering bomb / golden-apple combos.
